parameters.name: pivotunit
parameters.label: Pivot Unit
parameters.description: Specify the units used to position the pivot point.

parameters.name: rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Rotates a copy of the image around the pivot point specified above.

parameters.name: extend
parameters.label: Extend
parameters.description: This parameter determines what happens at the edge of the image.

parameters.name: pivoty
parameters.label: Pivoty
parameters.description: The pivot point determines where in the image the Rotate parameter will rotate around.
